title: ground_truth_pair
description: Phase L.2 artifact emitted by GroundTruthLinker. Pairs a transcript source_record with a meeting-minutes minutes_record by meeting date. High-confidence (exact date) pairs are auto-confirmed; medium-confidence (±1 day) pairs require human confirmation before they may be used as eval ground truth. Written to $SDL_ROOT/ground_truth/<pair_id>.json.

rubric_notes.description: Phase X2.5 (optional): annotator metadata used by judge calibration to score regulatory-verb discrimination separately from overall agreement. Existing GroundTruthLinker artifacts that lack this field continue to validate.

target_type.description: Phase X2.5: optional category tag used by per-type metric rollups and judge calibration. Existing pairs without target_type continue to validate.

decision_id.description: Phase X2.5: optional link back to the extracted decision_id used by judge_calibration to align judge verdict with the ground truth pass/fail.

ground_truth_pass.description: Phase X2.5: optional ground-truth verdict (the annotator's pass/fail), used by judge_calibration to compute agreement_rate_overall.
